name: John White
skill: Taking history, vital signs, and giving directions
scenario: Broken arm after an accident three hours ago.
introAudioText: Patient 1. John White. Broken arm after an accident three hours ago. motobike

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Nurse greeting
lines.text: Good morning. My name is Anna. I am a practical nurse. Shit will be shit.
lines.audioText: Good morning. My name is Anna. I am a practical nurse.Shit will be shit.

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: New slide
lines.text: The agent can click, scroll, type, and navigate web pages automatically. While working, it displays an overlay showing its progress and provides controls to stop execution if you need to intervene.
lines.audioText: The agent can click, scroll, type, and navigate web pages automatically. While working, it displays an overlay showing its progress and provides controls to stop execution if you need to intervene.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: New slide
lines.text: This is testing slide. we need to know how to sound generated. Bye
lines.audioText: This is testing slide. we need to know how to sound generated. Bye

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient greeting
lines.text: Good morning. may i see doctor please? Simply return to your Antigravity conversation, and the browser will be used automatically when appropriate.
lines.audioText: Good morning. may i see doctor please? Simply return to your Antigravity conversation, and the browser will be used automatically when appropriate.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask patient name
lines.text: May I ask your name, please? or should i go
lines.audioText: May I ask your name, please? or should i go

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient gives name
lines.text: My name is John White.
lines.audioText: My name is John White.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask symptoms
lines.text: What symptoms do you have?
lines.audioText: What symptoms do you have?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient symptom
lines.text: I have a broken arm.
lines.audioText: I have a broken arm.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask onset
lines.text: When did it happen?
lines.audioText: When did it happen?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient onset
lines.text: It happened three hours ago.
lines.audioText: It happened three hours ago.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask allergies
lines.text: Do you have any allergies?
lines.audioText: Do you have any allergies?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient allergy
lines.text: Yes, I am allergic to paracetamol.
lines.audioText: Yes, I am allergic to paracetamol.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask to check vital signs
lines.text: May I check your vital signs now?
lines.audioText: May I check your vital signs now?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient consent
lines.text: Yes, please.
lines.audioText: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Explain blood pressure
lines.text: Your Blood pressure is 126/82 millimeters of mercury.
lines.audioText: Your blood pressure is one hundred twenty-six over eighty-two millimeters of mercury.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Explain respiratory rate
lines.text: Your Respiratory rate is 18 breaths per minute.
lines.audioText: Your respiratory rate is eighteen breaths per minute.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Explain pulse rate
lines.text: Your Pulse rate is 86 beats per minute.
lines.audioText: Your pulse rate is eighty-six beats per minute.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Give X-ray direction
lines.text: The X-ray room is on the second floor. Please wait for the doctor.
lines.audioText: The X-ray room is on the second floor. Please wait for the doctor.

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient thanks
lines.text: Thank you.
lines.audioText: Thank you.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Nurse closing
lines.text: You are welcome. Have a good day.
lines.audioText: You are welcome. Have a good day.

name: Thomas Blake Blak
scenario: Chest pain for two days with history of heart disease.
introAudioText: Patient 2. Thomas Blake. Chest pain for two days. History of heart disease.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Nurse greeting
lines.text: Good morning. My name is _____. I am a practical nurse.
lines.audioText: Good morning. My name is blank. I am a practical nurse.

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient greeting
lines.text: Good morning.
lines.audioText: Good morning.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask patient name
lines.text: May I ask your name, please?
lines.audioText: May I ask your name, please?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient gives name
lines.text: My name is Thomas Blake.
lines.audioText: My name is Thomas Blake.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask symptoms
lines.text: What symptoms do you have?
lines.audioText: What symptoms do you have?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient symptom
lines.text: I have chest pain.
lines.audioText: I have chest pain.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask onset
lines.text: When did the symptoms start?
lines.audioText: When did the symptoms start?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient onset
lines.text: They started two days ago.
lines.audioText: They started two days ago.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask underlying disease
lines.text: Do you have any underlying diseases?
lines.audioText: Do you have any underlying diseases?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient history
lines.text: Yes, I have heart disease.
lines.audioText: Yes, I have heart disease.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Urgent response
lines.text: This is important. I will call the doctor and check your vital signs now.
lines.audioText: This is important. I will call the doctor and check your vital signs now.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Explain blood pressure
lines.text: Your Blood pressure is 146/92 millimeters of mercury.
lines.audioText: Your blood pressure is one hundred forty-six over ninety-two millimeters of mercury.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Explain pulse rate
lines.text: Your Pulse rate is 104 beats per minute.
lines.audioText: Your pulse rate is one hundred four beats per minute.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Give cardiology direction
lines.text: The cardiology clinic is on the second floor. Please stay seated and try to stay calm.
lines.audioText: The cardiology clinic is on the second floor. Please stay seated and try to stay calm.

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient thanks
lines.text: Thank you.
lines.audioText: Thank you.

name: Peter Brown
scenario: Diarrhea for three days with no allergies and no underlying disease.
introAudioText: Patient 3. Peter Brown. Diarrhea for three days. No allergies and no underlying disease.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Nurse greeting
lines.text: Good morning. My name is _____. I am a practical nurse.
lines.audioText: Good morning. My name is blank. I am a practical nurse.

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient greeting
lines.text: Good morning.
lines.audioText: Good morning.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask symptoms
lines.text: What symptoms do you have?
lines.audioText: What symptoms do you have?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient symptom
lines.text: I have diarrhea.
lines.audioText: I have diarrhea.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask diarrhea duration
lines.text: How long have you had diarrhea?
lines.audioText: How long have you had diarrhea?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient duration
lines.text: For three days.
lines.audioText: For three days.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Ask associated symptoms
lines.text: Do you have vomiting or abdominal pain?
lines.audioText: Do you have vomiting or abdominal pain?

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient associated symptoms
lines.text: Yes, I have abdominal pain, but no vomiting.
lines.audioText: Yes, I have abdominal pain, but no vomiting.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Explain tests
lines.text: We need a stool test and a urine test to check the cause.
lines.audioText: We need a stool test and a urine test to check the cause.

lines.speaker: nurse
lines.label: Give hydration advice
lines.text: Please drink small sips of water and wait for the doctor.
lines.audioText: Please drink small sips of water and wait for the doctor.

lines.speaker: patient
lines.label: Patient thanks
lines.text: Thank you.
lines.audioText: Thank you.
